_comment: Example project config for gen-veo-briefs.mjs, generalized from the chado series. Copy to src/<slug>/veo/briefs.config.json and edit. {exact} and {aliases} are substituted from subjectLock.

style.base: realistic cinematic wildlife documentary, Thai freshwater habitat, dark tea-colored water, moody natural light, natural colors, high detail, vertical 9:16
style.subjectDescriptor: species-accurate {exact}, {aliases}, large muscular elongated predator fish with broad head and robust body, natural wildlife proportions
style.noneDescriptor: visual insert for a documentary about {exact}, {aliases}, no fish visible in this shot

cameraMotions: slow tilt through the water column
shotVariations: unique shot design: wide empty habitat establishing shot
unique shot design: hidden-shadow reveal with mostly negative space
unique shot design: macro detail close-up, tight shallow depth of field
unique shot design: low muddy-bottom angle with foreground sediment
unique shot design: environmental disturbance only, no animal body
unique shot design: above-water surface reflection shot
unique shot design: locked-off ripple observation shot
unique shot design: lure object study in empty water
unique shot design: protective nursery composition with fry cloud
unique shot design: dark cover pocket from predator point of view
unique shot design: empty water column with lure path
unique shot design: front-facing hidden head portrait
unique shot design: entry splash and bubbles detail
unique shot design: camouflage texture shot, static ambush pose
unique shot design: final empty water transition into darkness
unique shot design: lateral structure pass with roots in foreground
unique shot design: top-down waterline geometry
unique shot design: split-level surface tension view
unique shot design: deep channel negative-space shot

ep1: empty dark underwater habitat, submerged roots, dead leaves, suspended particles, faint sunbeams, no fish visible
barely visible motionless adult subject silhouette hidden under roots, only shadow and head outline, not swimming
extreme close-up of one cautious subject eye behind aquatic grass, partial face only, no full body
muddy bottom, dead leaves, root tunnel, tiny disturbed sediment as if prey passed nearby, no fish visible
sudden burst of bubbles, mud plume, and shaken aquatic grass showing an unseen strike path, no fish visible
calm Thai swamp surface, reeds and lotus edges reflected in dark tea-colored water, no fish visible
single small circular breathing ripple expanding on still water, the fish remains unseen below the surface, no fish visible
artificial lure suspended motionless underwater in front of dark empty cover, no fish visible
adult subject guarding orange-red fry cloud, parent held still in background, protective nursery scene
dark overhanging grass pocket and root shadow where an ambush predator could hide, no fish visible
small lure passes through open water and is ignored, empty water column, no fish visible
front-facing subject head partly hidden in shadow, broad head, still posture, no circling
tackle silhouette entering dark tea-colored water with soft bubbles around it, no fish visible
camouflaged subject body partially blended into roots and leaves, static ambush posture, not swimming
empty dark underwater channel fading into black water, suspended particles and roots only, no fish visible
